title: mastigostyla tunariensis
intro: Mastigostyla tunariensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mastigostyla tunariensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be administered orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
